plan_brief: Detect the blue rectangular prism first, then estimate its top grasp pose and corresponding pre-grasp pose, then move to pre-grasp pose then grasp pose, close the gripper to grab the object, retreat upward, return to observe pose and verify if the task is completed.
program:
debug("Starting detection of target blue rectangular prism")
blue_prism = detect_object_by_text("blue rectangular prism")
debug("Blue rectangular prism detection finished")
grasp_pose = estimate_top_grasp_pose(blue_prism)
pregrasp_pose = build_pregrasp_pose(grasp_pose)
debug("Grasp pose and pregrasp pose estimation finished")
open_gripper()
move_to_pose(pregrasp_pose)
move_to_pose(grasp_pose)
close_gripper()
stabilize_grasp()
retreat()
return_to_observe_pose()
result = ai_verify_atomic_task()
